category.scope_note: Portable lithium batteries and power banks (China export to Côte d'Ivoire) compliance comparison.

title.en: China-to-Côte d'Ivoire Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Matrix
title.zh: 中国出口科特迪瓦锂电池/移动电源合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國出口科特迪瓦鋰電池/行動電源合規差距矩陣

description.en: Source-linked comparison for lithium batteries and power banks sold into Côte d'Ivoire. It covers CODINORM and Ministry of Trade VoC conformity, NI/IEC safety references, ARTCI radio controls, UN 38.3 transport, and the import role of the local in-country importer at Abidjan and San-Pedro. Electrical systems are typically 220 V at 50 Hz in both China household networks and the target market context used for destination readiness checks.
description.zh: 科特迪瓦市场（中国出口至科特迪瓦）锂电池与移动电源合规对照。覆盖 CODINORM 与商贸部 VoC 合格进口检验、NI/IEC 安全基准、ARTCI 无线规制、UN 38.3运输要求，以及在阿比让与圣彼得港操作的本地进口商角色。目标市场供电信息为 220 V、50 Hz，需与中国出厂参数和目标工况一并核对。
description.zht: 科特迪瓦市場（中國出口科特迪瓦）鋰電池與行動電源合規對照。涵蓋 CODINORM 與商務部 VoC 合格進口檢驗、NI／IEC 安全基準、ARTCI 無線規制、UN 38.3 運輸要求，以及在阿比讓與聖彼得港作業的本地進口商角色。目標市場電源條件為 220 V、50 Hz，需與中國出廠參數與目的地運作條件一併核對。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute legal advice, certification, customs declaration approval, customs classification decision, or market-access authorization.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成法律咨询、认证结论、海关申报批准、税则归类决定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成法律諮詢、認證結論、海關申報批准、稅則歸類決定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese exporters should treat CODINORM/VoC as target-market rules, not only the Chinese GB/GB-T or CCC baseline. For lithium batteries and power banks, the key non-equivalent elements are VoC import conformity, French-language documentation to clear customs at Abidjan or San-Pedro, local importer coordination, ARTCI checks for wireless variants, and in-country reporting workflows. Energy labels and product-level details should be aligned to Côte d'Ivoire market handling even where CN baseline documents already exist.
answer_first.zh: 中国出口商应把 CODINORM 与 VoC 视为目标市场规则，而非单靠 GB/GB-T 或 CCC 准备。对于锂电池与移动电源，关键差距在于 VoC 进口合规、阿比让或圣彼得港的法语文件配合、本地进口商闭环、ARTCI 对无线功能的检查，以及目标市场的入境流程。即使已具备中国国内资料，也需补齐科特迪瓦侧的电气与监管对照；科特迪瓦当前未见欧盟式统一 RoHS、锂电池扩展责任（横向）与户外噪声一体化制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國出口商應把 CODINORM 與 VoC 視為目標市場規則，而非僅依靠 GB/GB-T 或 CCC 準備。對於鋰電池與行動電源，關鍵差距在於 VoC 進口合規、阿比讓或聖彼德港的法語文件配合、本地進口商閉環、ARTCI 對無線功能的檢查，以及目標市場的入境流程。即使已具備中國國內資料，也需補齊科特迪瓦側的電氣與監管對照；科特迪瓦目前未見歐盟式統一 RoHS、鋰電池擴展責任（橫向）與戶外噪音一體化制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Use official regulator, standard body, or customs authority sources; each row must include publisher, source URL, accessed date and verified=false before human_reviewed can become true.
